creator: sepherosa@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Boris Korzun from comment #8)

1) I have initiated the MFC to stable/11 request to re.  Waiting for re's approval.

2) Why stable/10 does not work w/ GEN2 Hyper-V?  As far as we have tested @ Microsoft, it works as expected.  If it did not work for you, please file a PR and specific stable/10 SVN version you tested; and we will check.
